message:
feat(tests): add terminal E2E and layout composer UX/A11y test suites

Terminal E2E (bd-2ueu.6): 44 tests across PTY management, ANSI
rendering, input forwarding integration, and resize handling.
Layout Composer UX/A11y (bd-32my.6): 19 tests covering keybindings,
focus order, contrast/legibility, and stress invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
